name: Ganesh Kalal (MIEAust)
tagline: Project Engineer — Demolition, Remediation & Major Infrastructure
kicker: Melbourne, VIC • Tier 1/2 Delivery • Safety • QA/QC • Procurement & Contracts
heroTitle: I deliver complex demolition and civil works — safely, compliantly, and with calm site control.
heroSubtitle: Civil & Structural Engineer with 5+ years’ experience across refinery closures, major transport infrastructure and telecom upgrades. Strong in subcontractor management, SOW/RFQ procurement, design review, site inspections, QA/QC traceability and statutory approvals. Engineers Australia member (MIEAust), progressing toward NER (and working toward PMP).
signatureLine: “Clear sequence, strong controls, clean QA — deliver it right.”
aboutLead: A personal website view of my work — story-driven and easy to explore.
aboutStory: I’m a Melbourne-based Project Engineer working across demolition, refinery closures, remediation interfaces and civil/structural packages. I enjoy planning complex sequences, building safe systems (SWMS, permits, exclusion zones), coordinating subcontractors, and keeping QA documentation audit-ready. I’m comfortable working with clients, consultants, councils and WorkSafe/authority stakeholders to deliver compliant outcomes — including remote delivery environments.
knownFor: Managing subcontractor packages and site mobilisation on $100M+ projects
SOW/RFQ preparation, tender evaluation and contract administration
Design review and compliance checks (AS 3600, AS 4100, AS/NZS 1170)
Site inspections, hold-point verification, safety audits and QA traceability
Progress reporting, cost forecasting, variations and EOT support
tools: Project/Reporting: MS Project, P6, Procore, Oracle NetSuite, MS Office
Analysis: SpaceGass, Microstran, Structural Toolkit, MS Tower, RAPT, Inducta
Standards: NCC, Australian Standards, VicRoads / major project standards

bento.title: How I run a site
bento.preview: I keep delivery calm and structured: sequence, controls, briefings, inspections, close-out evidence.
bento.fullText: My delivery approach is built around clear sequencing, visible controls and consistent QA. I focus on daily constraints, subcontractor interfaces, and evidence capture throughout the job so handover is smooth.
bullets: Daily prestart + constraints check
Clear access/exclusion control
Subcontractor sequencing + interfaces
Evidence capture (photos, checklists, diaries)

bento.title: Procurement & contracts
bento.preview: I prepare scopes, run RFQs and evaluate tenders with technical + commercial rigour.
bento.fullText: I support pre-contract and delivery procurement with SOW/RFQs, tender evaluation and contract admin, including variations and progress claims to keep cost and program under control.
bullets: SOW/RFQ + tender packaging
Technical & commercial evaluation
Progress claims verification
Variations/EOT support

bento.title: Safety & compliance
bento.preview: Demolition/industrial works need disciplined critical risk controls, permits and clear communication.
bento.fullText: I support safety-first delivery through SWMS, risk controls, hold points, audits and practical site rules — especially where there are live interfaces, public risk, or complex industrial constraints.
bullets: SWMS + work packs
Hold/witness points and verification
Safety audits + critical risk controls
WorkSafe/council interface support

bento.title: QA/QC & documentation
bento.preview: ITPs, inspection evidence, NCR close-out and MDR-style packs — kept organised from day one.
bento.fullText: I keep QA evidence audit-ready by maintaining ITPs, checklists, inspection records and close-out packs progressively — not at the end of the job.
bullets: ITPs, checklists, lot tracking
NCR actions + closure
RFI tracking and responses
Close-out packs / MDR style compilation

projects.title: ExxonMobil Oil Refinery Closure — Demolition & Civil Packages
projects.preview: Managed subcontractor packages, SOW/RFQ procurement, design review and on-site civil/structural works — including statutory approvals.
projects.fullText: Project Engineer supporting decommissioning and demolition of major refinery assets and complex brownfield scopes. Delivered procurement, coordination, inspections and compliance with a strong focus on safety, QA and authority requirements.
bullets: Prepared SOWs/RFQs and evaluated 15+ subcontractor tenders
Reviewed/approved contractor designs and resolved RFIs/technical queries
Administered progress claims and supported variations (reported up to ~$8M+)
Coordinated statutory approvals with Hobsons Bay City Council

projects.title: Rio Tinto Bauxite Refinery Closure & Land Remediation
projects.preview: Australia’s largest industrial demolition/closure program — coordination, design review, QA verification and remote delivery support.
projects.fullText: Supported procurement documentation, reviewed structural design packages for compliance and managed coordination, quality verification and progress across multiple subcontractors in a remote delivery environment.
bullets: Reviewed structural packages for AS 3600 & AS 4100 compliance
Coordinated contractor interfaces, quality verification and reporting
Supported remote mobilisation, supplier onboarding and procurement
Supported stakeholder interface requirements (site closure standards)

projects.title: National 5G Telecom Upgrade Program
projects.preview: Structural design coordination and approvals for large-scale upgrade rollout; inspections and compliance to AS/NZS 1170 & AS 4100.
projects.fullText: Delivered structural upgrades for lattice towers, steel poles and timber poles, coordinating fabrication inputs, field inspections and authority approvals to maintain delivery milestones.
bullets: Delivered 150+ tower/pole upgrades (design + delivery coordination)
Completed 100+ site inspections for safety and design conformance
Reviewed drawings/ITPs for AS/NZS 1170 & AS 4100 compliance
Secured statutory approvals across 20+ councils

projects.title: West Gate Freeway Upgrade
projects.preview: Concrete barrier/noise wall design support and construction oversight to VicRoads standards and AS 5100.
projects.fullText: Delivered design and site supervision for reinforced concrete crash barriers and precast noise walls, including testing/verification and installation oversight.
bullets: Supervised concrete pours, reinforcement verification and panel installation
Reviewed subcontractor shop drawings and coordinated site execution
Delivered QA including concrete testing and traceability checks
Reported outcome: zero non-conformances across 100+ installations

projects.title: Mumbai Metro Line 4 & 5
projects.preview: QA/QC and site supervision support for viaduct/station works and tunnel interfaces in dense urban conditions.
projects.fullText: Supported inspection/testing of reinforced concrete works (foundations, pile caps, segments) and assisted verification activities with project teams under tight constraints.
bullets: Concrete QA/QC: slump, sampling, dimensional checks and reporting
Supported piling and foundation verification activities (PIT/DLT exposure)
Monitored excavation safety and installation of bearings/bridge elements
Coordinated with engineers/surveyors and supported NCR close-out
Planning, sequencing and delivery of civil/structural works on $100M+ projects
SOW/RFQs, ITPs, RFIs, progress reporting (cost/schedule/risk)
Safety audits, hold-point verification, variations and EOT support
Statutory approvals interface (councils / WorkSafe as required)
